fever.advice: Rest, stay hydrated, take paracetamol if needed. Consult doctor if fever persists beyond 3 days or exceeds 103°F.

headache.description: Pain or discomfort in the head or neck region
headache.advice: Rest in a quiet, dark room. Stay hydrated. Apply cold compress. Take pain reliever if needed. Consult doctor if severe or persistent.

cough.advice: Stay hydrated, use honey for soothing, avoid irritants. Consult doctor if cough persists beyond 3 weeks or has blood.

sore_throat.description: Pain or irritation in the throat
sore_throat.advice: Gargle with warm salt water, stay hydrated, use throat lozenges. Consult doctor if severe pain or difficulty swallowing.

stomach_pain.description: Discomfort or pain in the abdominal area
stomach_pain.advice: Eat bland foods, stay hydrated, avoid spicy/fatty foods. Consult doctor if severe pain, vomiting, or blood in stool.

diarrhea.advice: Stay hydrated with ORS, eat bland foods (BRAT diet), avoid dairy. Consult doctor if persists beyond 2 days or has blood.

nausea.advice: Eat small, bland meals. Sip ginger tea or clear fluids. Rest. Consult doctor if persistent or with severe symptoms.

fatigue.description: Extreme tiredness or lack of energy
fatigue.advice: Get adequate sleep, eat balanced diet, exercise regularly, manage stress. Consult doctor if persistent despite rest.

chest_pain.description: Pain or discomfort in the chest area
chest_pain.advice: SEEK IMMEDIATE MEDICAL ATTENTION if severe, radiating to arm/jaw, with shortness of breath, or sweating. Could indicate heart problem.

shortness_of_breath.advice: Sit upright, stay calm, breathe slowly. SEEK IMMEDIATE HELP if severe, sudden, or with chest pain.

dizziness.advice: Sit or lie down, stay hydrated, avoid sudden movements. Consult doctor if frequent or severe.

back_pain.advice: Rest, apply heat/cold, gentle stretching, maintain good posture. Consult doctor if severe or radiating to legs.

joint_pain.description: Pain in one or more joints
joint_pain.advice: Rest the joint, apply ice, gentle movement. Consult doctor if swollen, red, or limiting movement.

skin_rash.description: Changes in skin color, texture, or appearance
skin_rash.advice: Keep area clean and dry, avoid irritants, use moisturizer. Consult doctor if spreading, painful, or with fever.

insomnia.advice: Maintain sleep schedule, avoid screens before bed, create relaxing bedtime routine. Consult doctor if chronic.

common_cold.name: Common Cold
common_cold.treatment: Rest, fluids, over-the-counter cold medications. No antibiotics needed (viral infection).
common_cold.prevention: Wash hands frequently, avoid close contact with sick people, don't touch face.

flu.name: Influenza (Flu)
flu.treatment: Rest, fluids, antiviral medications if prescribed early. Consult doctor if high-risk group.
flu.prevention: Annual flu vaccine, good hygiene, avoid sick people.

gastroenteritis.name: Stomach Flu (Gastroenteritis)
gastroenteritis.treatment: Stay hydrated with ORS, rest, bland diet. Consult doctor if severe dehydration.
gastroenteritis.prevention: Wash hands, safe food handling, clean water.

migraine.name: Migraine Headache
migraine.treatment: Rest in dark room, pain relievers, prescription medications. Identify and avoid triggers.
migraine.prevention: Regular sleep, stress management, avoid triggers (certain foods, stress).

hypertension.name: High Blood Pressure
hypertension.treatment: Lifestyle changes (diet, exercise), medications as prescribed. Regular monitoring essential.
hypertension.prevention: Healthy diet (low salt), regular exercise, maintain healthy weight, limit alcohol.

diabetes.name: Diabetes
diabetes.treatment: Blood sugar monitoring, medications/insulin, diet control, regular exercise.
diabetes.prevention: Maintain healthy weight, regular exercise, balanced diet, regular checkups.

asthma.name: Asthma
asthma.treatment: Inhalers (rescue and controller), avoid triggers, action plan with doctor.
asthma.prevention: Identify and avoid triggers (allergens, smoke, cold air), take medications as prescribed.

nutrition.balanced_diet: Include fruits, vegetables, whole grains, lean proteins, and healthy fats daily.
nutrition.hydration: Drink 8-10 glasses of water daily. More if exercising or in hot weather.
nutrition.vitamins: Get vitamins from food first. Supplements only if deficient (consult doctor).
nutrition.meal_timing: Eat regular meals, don't skip breakfast, avoid late-night heavy meals.

exercise.recommendation: 150 minutes moderate exercise or 75 minutes vigorous exercise per week.
exercise.types: Mix cardio (walking, running), strength training, and flexibility exercises.
exercise.benefits: Improves heart health, weight management, mood, sleep, and reduces disease risk.
exercise.safety: Start slowly, warm up, stay hydrated, listen to your body.

sleep.duration: Adults need 7-9 hours, teenagers 8-10 hours, children 9-12 hours per night.
sleep.hygiene: Regular schedule, dark quiet room, avoid screens 1 hour before bed, comfortable temperature.
sleep.importance: Essential for physical health, mental health, immune function, and cognitive performance.

mental_health.stress_management: Practice relaxation techniques, exercise, adequate sleep, social connections.
mental_health.warning_signs: Persistent sadness, anxiety, changes in sleep/appetite, loss of interest, thoughts of self-harm.
mental_health.seeking_help: Talk to doctor, counselor, or mental health professional. It's okay to ask for help.
mental_health.self_care: Regular exercise, healthy diet, adequate sleep, hobbies, social connections, mindfulness.

preventive_care.checkups: Annual physical exam, dental checkups twice yearly, eye exams as recommended.
preventive_care.screenings: Blood pressure, cholesterol, diabetes, cancer screenings as per age and risk factors.
preventive_care.vaccinations: Stay up-to-date with recommended vaccines (flu, COVID, tetanus, etc.).
preventive_care.lifestyle: Don't smoke, limit alcohol, maintain healthy weight, manage stress, stay active.

seek_immediate_help: Difficulty breathing or shortness of breath
Signs of stroke (face drooping, arm weakness, speech difficulty)
emergency_signs.emergency_number: Call emergency services (108 in India, 911 in US) immediately for life-threatening situations.
